sections.coverage: Weak derivatives, W^{k,p}, smooth approximation, Poincare, Sobolev embedding, trace, and manifold-valued map caveat.

sections.coverage: Interior regularity, cutoff localization, harmonic remainder, and divergence-form weak data.
